steps.title: Identify the contrast structure
steps.content: The underlined sentence describes what "most other contemporaneous personal manuscripts" typically contained (celebrated medieval authors, elite readings), positioned before "whereas" shifts to the HM's distinctive content (popular and practical). The "whereas" signal marks the essential contrast.

steps.title: Match the function
steps.content:
The underlined portion provides context -- describing what was typical in contemporary manuscripts -- that makes the HM's distinctive character visible as an outlier.

Choices A, B, and D misidentify the purpose:
  • A claims the comparison is inadequate
  • B focuses on prevalence rather than content
  • D reverses the causal direction

This matches choice C -- C is correct.
